Techno Brain Achieves Select Tier Partner Status
April 30, 2024

Techno Brain Group is thrilled to announce that we have achieved the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Select Tier Partner status (one of the highest levels of partnership with AWS). This is barely three months – (a record time) since we were selected to undergo the highly esteemed Partner Transformation Program by Amazon Web Services (AWS). This demonstrates our dedication and expertise in delivering top-quality cloud services to our customers.

The AWS partner program recognizes its partners’ different levels of expertise and commitment. A select partner has to meet the technical requirements and demonstrate experience managing the AWS platform. Partners in this category are proven to deliver successful AWS-based solutions to their clients and maintain a strong commitment to education and training.

This is a confirmation of our commitment to setting the standard for digital transformation, especially in Africa, and strengthens our position as a dependable technology partner. Our partners should be confident that we will help them reach their business objectives and speed up their digital transformation journey.

This marks yet another chapter in our ongoing story of innovation and progress. As we continue working closely with AWS, we are thrilled to share it with you, our clients, as this milestone shows our commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions and exceptional service remains stronger than ever.

We are proud to invite you to be a part of this transformational journey as we shape the future of digital innovation.
